sys_script_include.description: Classifies a completed search session into one of six outcome types and persists the result to u_sp_search_outcome. Called by POST /session/end REST endpoint and SearchPulseReputationJob.
sys_script_include.name: SearchPulseClassifier

sys_script_include.description: Provides reputation-based score multipliers and re-ranks search result sets. Score bands: >=75 → 1.2x, 50-74 → 1.0x, 30-49 → 0.8x, 0-29 → 0.5x.
sys_script_include.name: SearchPulseRankingEngine

sys_script_include.description: Computes trust badge metadata for KB articles. Badges: Frequently Helpful (green, score>=75), Updated Recently (blue, updated<=30d and score>=50), May Be Outdated (amber, score 30-49 and age>180d).
sys_script_include.name: SearchPulseBadgeService

sys_trigger.name: SearchPulseReputationJob

sys_ws_definition.description: Accepts client-side search session signals from the Service Portal.
sys_ws_definition.name: SearchPulse Session API
sys_ws_definition.short_description: SearchPulse Session API for capturing search signals

sys_ws_operation.name: Start Session
sys_ws_operation.short_description: Creates a new search session record and returns a session_id.

sys_ws_operation.name: Record Signal
sys_ws_operation.short_description: Records a single user signal event against an existing session.

sys_ws_operation.name: End Session
sys_ws_operation.short_description: Finalizes the session and triggers outcome classification.

sp_widget.css: .sp-searchpulse-widget{font-family:inherit;max-width:860px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 16px}.sp-searchpulse-widget .sp-search-bar{margin-bottom:20px}.sp-searchpulse-widget .sp-search-bar .input-group{box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.1);border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden}.sp-searchpulse-widget .sp-search-bar .sp-search-input{height:48px;font-size:16px;border:1px solid #dde1e7;border-right:none;padding:10px 16px}.sp-searchpulse-widget .sp-search-bar .sp-search-btn{height:48px;padding:0 24px;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;background-color:#06c;border-color:#06c;border-radius:0 6px 6px 0}.sp-searchpulse-widget .sp-summary-panel{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f0f7ff,#e8f4ff);border:1px solid #b3d4f5;border-radius:8px;padding:16px 20px;margin-bottom:20px}.sp-searchpulse-widget .sp-result-item{padding:16px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #f0f2f5;cursor:pointer}.sp-searchpulse-widget .sp-result-title{font-size:17px;font-weight:600;color:#06c;text-decoration:none}.sp-searchpulse-widget .sp-result-snippet{font-size:14px;color:#444;line-height:1.55;margin:0 0 8px}.sp-searchpulse-widget .sp-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:12px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.03em;white-space:nowrap}.sp-searchpulse-widget .sp-badge.sp-badge-green{background-color:#e8f5e9;color:#2e7d32;border:1px solid #a5d6a7}.sp-searchpulse-widget .sp-badge.sp-badge-blue{background-color:#e3f2fd;color:#1565c0;border:1px solid #90caf9}.sp-searchpulse-widget .sp-badge.sp-badge-amber{background-color:#fff8e1;color:#e65100;border:1px solid #ffcc80}.sp-searchpulse-widget .sp-thumb-btn{background:transparent;border:1px solid #b3d4f5;color:#06c;border-radius:50%;width:32px;height:32px;padding:0;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer}.sp-searchpulse-widget .sp-thumb-btn.active{background-color:#06c;color:#fff}
sp_widget.description: Enhanced Service Portal search widget with SearchPulse signal capture, reputation-based re-ranking, and trust badge display.
sp_widget.name: SearchPulse Search Widget
sp_widget.option_schema: [{"name":"search_placeholder","label":"Search Placeholder Text","type":"string","default_value":"Search for answers..."},{"name":"max_results","label":"Maximum Results","type":"integer","default_value":10},{"name":"show_badges","label":"Show Reputation Badges","type":"boolean","default_value":true},{"name":"show_summary_feedback","label":"Show AI Summary Feedback Thumbs","type":"boolean","default_value":true}]
sp_widget.template:
AI Summary
Was this helpful? Thanks!
{{c.results.length}} result(s) for "{{c.lastQuery}}"
  • {{result.badge.label}}

    {{result.category}}   {{result.updated}}

No results found for "{{c.lastQuery}}"

Search temporarily unavailable.

sp_widget.description: Standalone trust badge component for KB article view pages. Shows Frequently Helpful, Updated Recently, or May Be Outdated based on reputation score.
sp_widget.name: SearchPulse Badge Widget
sp_widget.template: {{c.badge.label}} {{c.reputationScore}}
